race.description: Tursa Employment & Training Casino Flying Hcp
race.comment: KRAKARIB (4) classy sprinter resuming and handles the going. Sat on the fast pace when fifth over 1100m at Ipswich last February. Fitted with the one trial over 685m. Can get across from the draw and take catching. EAGLE HAWK STAR (5) kept fresh for this after she warmed up late from back in the field to get up in a tight finish over 1005m at Grafton. Will be tough to stop again with the good early tempo. STATE IN TEXAS (3) winning apprentice hops back aboard for this and can return to form in this company. Has the ability to produce a better result. KATE'S TIARA (9) resumes with a good fresh record. Went back from the wide gate and didn't make an impact seventh over 1050m at Inverell last January. Well drawn and conditions suit. The chances don't end there.
